ddls:
CREATE TABLE "presidential_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the presidents table */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the positions table */,
  "appointee_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the appointees table */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the departments table */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the appointment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the appointment */,
  "length_months" INTEGER /* Length of the appointment in months */,
  "length_days" INTEGER /* Length of the appointment in days */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the appointment (e.g., active, resigned, terminated) */,
  "appointment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the termination of the appointment */,
  "official_statement" TEXT /* Official statement or press release regarding the appointment */,
  "press_release" TEXT /* Press release or media coverage of the appointment */,
  "historical_context" TEXT /* Historical context or background information about the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the appointment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presidents" (
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each president */,
  "president_name" TEXT /* Name of the president */,
  "president_term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the president's term */,
  "president_term_end" TEXT /* End date of the president's term */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the president */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the departments table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointees" (
  "appointee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointee */,
  "appointee_name" TEXT /* Name of the appointee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
